message:
test(scripting): add integration test for Lua extension entrypoint loading

Verify that LuaEngine.load_extension() correctly executes a Lua script
entrypoint, registers events, and returns an extension ID that can be
used for subsequent unload. Uses tempfile to create an isolated script
that registers a wezterm event handler, confirming the full load/unload
lifecycle works end-to-end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
